apply_immediately.description: Indicates whether changes to the instance should be applied immediately or during the next maintenance window.

auto_minor_version_upgrade.description: Indicates whether minor engine upgrades are applied automatically during the maintenance window.

availability_zone.description: Specifies the Availability Zone where the Neptune cluster instance will be launched. Must match one of the available zones in the region.

cluster_identifier.description: Identifier of the Neptune cluster to associate the instance with; must match an existing cluster.

engine.description: Specifies the database engine to be used for the Neptune cluster instance, such as 'neptune'.

engine_version.description: Specifies the version of the Neptune database engine; must be compatible with the associated Neptune cluster.

identifier.description: Unique identifier for the Neptune cluster instance; must be unique within the region and cannot be changed after creation.

identifier_prefix.description: Specifies a prefix for the unique identifier of the Neptune cluster instance; must be unique and cannot exceed 63 characters.

instance_class.description: Specifies the instance class for the Neptune cluster instance, such as db.r5.large; must be compatible with Neptune.

neptune_parameter_group_name.description: Specifies the name of the Neptune parameter group associated with the cluster instance. Must match an existing parameter group.

neptune_subnet_group_name.description: Name of the Neptune subnet group to associate with the instance; must exist in the same region as the cluster.

port.description: Specifies the port number for the Neptune cluster instance; must match the port of the associated Neptune cluster.

preferred_backup_window.description: Specifies the daily time range during which automated backups are created, formatted as hh24:mi-hh24:mi in UTC.

preferred_maintenance_window.description: Specifies the weekly time range during which system maintenance can occur, formatted as ddd:hh24:mi-ddd:hh24:mi, where ddd is the day of the week.

promotion_tier.description: Specifies the failover priority of the instance, with lower values having higher priority. Must be between 0 and 15.

publicly_accessible.description: Specifies whether the instance is publicly accessible. Set to true for public access or false for private access.

skip_final_snapshot.description: Determines whether a final DB snapshot is created before the instance is deleted; must be true or false.

tags.description: Key-value pairs to associate with the Neptune cluster instance for organizational purposes or cost allocation.

timeouts.description: Defines timeout settings for creating, updating, and deleting the Neptune cluster instance.
